violations.text: Fried Chicken was observed held at 130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Fried Chicken was reheated to 189 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Unit was also adjusted to a higher temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. speed rack and plastic covering in walk-in cooler 2. fanguards in walk-in cooler 3. walls in walk-in cooler New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
The condensate from the walk-in cooler unit is draining into the handsink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
Several ceiling tiles in the restroom and warewashing area was observed in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Owner must reinstate FMC license with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The condensate from the chest freezer refrigeration unit was observed with an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Corrective Action - establishment must defrost freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
